name: Chill Touch
conditions: Target can't regain HP until start of your next turn; if target is undead, it also has disadvantage on attack rolls against you until the end of your next turn.
description: You create a ghostly, skeletal hand in the space of a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the creature to assail it with the chill of the grave. On a hit, the target takes 2d8 necrotic damage, and it can't regain hit points until the start of your next turn. Until then, the hand clings to the target. If you hit an undead target, it also has disadvantage on attack rolls against you until the end of your next turn.

upcast.note: Damage increases by 1d8 at 11th level (3d8) and 17th level (4d8)

name: Dancing Lights
description: Create up to four floating torch-sized lights within range. Each sheds dim light in a 10-ft. radius. You can move them up to 60 ft. as a bonus action each turn.

name: Fire Bolt
conditions: A flammable object hit by this spell ignites if it isn't being worn or carried.
description: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 2d10 fire damage. A flammable object hit by this spell ignites if it isn't being worn or carried.

upcast.note: Damage increases by 1d10 at 11th level (3d10) and 17th level (4d10)

name: Message
description: Point at a creature within range and whisper a message. Only the target hears it and can reply in a whisper that only you hear. The message passes through most barriers.

name: Shocking Grasp
conditions: Target can't take reactions until start of its next turn.
description: Lightning springs from your hand to deliver a shock to a creature you try to touch. Make a melee spell attack against the target. You have advantage on the attack roll if the target is wearing armor made of metal. On a hit, the target takes 2d8 lightning damage, and it can't take reactions until the start of its next turn.

upcast.note: Damage increases by 1d8 at 11th level (3d8) and 17th level (4d8)

name: Scorching Ray
description: You create three rays of fire and hurl them at targets within range. You can hurl them at one target or several. Make a ranged spell attack for each ray. On a hit, the target takes 2d6 fire damage.

name: Fly
conditions: Target gains flying speed of 60 feet.
description: You touch a willing creature. The target gains a flying speed of 60 feet for the duration. When the spell ends, the target falls if it is still aloft, unless it can stop the fall.

name: Magic Missile
description: Create three glowing darts of magical force. Each dart automatically hits and deals 1d4+1 force damage. All three can target the same creature or different ones. Higher slots add one dart per level above 1st.

name: Shield
description: A sudden barrier of force grants +5 AC until the start of your next turn, including against the triggering attack. Also negates magic missile.

name: Misty Step
description: Step through silver mist and reappear up to 30 feet away in an unoccupied space you can see.

name: Dragon's Breath
description: Imbue a willing creature with the power to exhale destructive energy. Until the spell ends, the creature can use an action to exhale a 15-ft. cone: creatures in the area make a CON save or take 3d6 damage of the chosen type (half on success). Higher slots add 1d6 per level above 2nd.
